title: Health Alert
description: Most people have a problem with healing like me so this mod will make a sound whenever your Health is low and will notify you to Heal!
body:
A **client-side Fabric mod** that alerts you when your health is low using adaptive sound cues and a visual warning.

→ **Plays warning sounds** when your health drops below a safe threshold  
→ *Increases urgency* as health gets lower (faster, louder, lower-pitched)  
→ **Automatically stops** once your health recovers  

---

### Features
• Adaptive alert sound based on current health  
• Dynamic volume and pitch scaling  
• Visual alert with fading intensity  
• Lightweight and fully client-side  
• No server support required
